title: cineraria integrifolia var. umbellata
intro: Cineraria integrifolia var. umbellata, also known as the Cineraria, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and sprawling habit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cineraria include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Cineraria can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
